'''Carolyn Golledge''' is an author who wrote the short stories ''[[Desperate Measures]]'' (1996) and ''[[Firepower]]'' (1995), which were published in ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' issues [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|8]] and [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|10]] and later made available on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

{{Bio-stub}}
